svg.title: Country geography and cross-layer concentration
svg.desc: Auditable service-country units only; physical metrics describe feasible corridor candidates.
svg.text: Auditable service-country units only; physical metrics describe feasible corridor candidates.
Boxes show Q1–Q3; center line is median; whiskers use 1.5×IQR; dots are sampled outliers.
Higher values indicate stronger corridor-observation concentration.
Raw counts shown on a log1p axis; lower values indicate narrower concentration.
Network-side concentration over the comparable segment population.
Cumulative observation mass assigned to the three leading corridor candidates.
